# ❓ Type of Change
- [ ] 🐞 Bug Fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] ♻️ Enhancement
- [ ] 🧪 Tests
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor
- [ ] 🚀 Performance
- [ ] 🛠️ CI/CD
- [ ] 🔄 Other (please explain)

# 📜 Summary
<!--
Provide a brief summary of the changes made in this PR.
- What problem does it solve?
- What is the impact of this change?
- Does it introduce any breaking changes?
- If applicable, include links to documentation, designs, or related tickets.
-->

# 🤔 Motivation & Context
<!--
Give a detailed explanation of why this change was necessary.
- How does this change address the problem?
- Why was this approach chosen?
- Are there any alternative solutions considered?
- If applicable, add images/videos to help illustrate the changes.
-->

# 🧪 How to Test
<!--
Provide clear testing steps for reviewers.
For example, for a bug fix:

## Prerequisites
- Be logged in with an account (e.g., `user@example.com`).
- Ensure that feature flag `xyz_feature` is enabled.

## Steps
1. Navigate to the **Play Tab**.
2. Select **Range Mode**.
3. Open **Practice Mode**.
4. Take 2 shots.

## Expected Result
- The top view should correctly display the two shots.
- No errors should be logged in the console.
-->

# 🏗️ Todo
<!--
List any remaining tasks that are not covered by this PR. Remove this section if not needed.
-->
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2

# 📱 Screenshots

Attach relevant screenshots or screen recordings for UI/UX changes.

- A GIF or video showing the behavior

# 🔗 Relevant links

Provide a links to a relevant ticket or documentation

Examples:
Azure DevOps: AB#1234 (this will automatically be linked to Azure DevOps Work Item if you follow this pattern)
GitHub: #1234
-->

# ✅ Checklist
- [ ] 🧹 Ran linters `spotless check/apply` / `swiftlint autocorrect`
- [ ] 🔒 Feature flag added (if applicable)
- [ ] 🎨 UI aligns with design in Figma
- [ ] 🧪 Tests cover new functionality
- [ ] 📢 Discussed major changes with the team
- [ ] 🏷️ Test tags (shared) added to enable QA tests
